projects.description: Developed a web-based library management system as a Grade 12 research project at LUNHS. The system improves book tracking, borrowing and returning transactions, and library record management.

projects.title: Web-Based Online Enrollment System
projects.description: The Web-Based Online Enrollment System enables students to enroll online while helping La Union National High School (LUNHS) manage enrollment faster, more accurately, and with less paperwork.

projects.title: Guidance Management System
projects.description: The Guidance Management System helps La Union National High School (LUNHS) manage student guidance records, counseling services, and appointments efficiently. It improves record organization, accessibility, and the delivery of guidance services.
